name: logistics dispatchers managing 10-20 drivers tool
description: For logistics dispatchers managing 10-20 drivers, manual tracking of hours-of-service causes compliance issues that lead to penalties. We automate tracking instead of manual tracking of driver logs.
problem_solved: Ensuring compliance with hours-of-service regulations to avoid penalties.
